layoutRegions.name: metric-strip
layoutRegions.purpose: Dense glanceable numbers for current system or workflow state.

layoutRegions.name: activity-table
layoutRegions.purpose: Sortable rows for recent events, jobs, or records.

layoutRegions.name: side-panel
layoutRegions.purpose: Filters and focused details without leaving the dashboard.

components.name: MetricTile
components.purpose: Small fixed-format tile with label, value, and semantic delta.
interactions: keeps value from shifting neighboring tiles

components.name: DataRow
components.purpose: Scannable table row with selected and hover states.

components.name: FilterToggle
components.purpose: Binary dashboard filter with clear active state.

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
